items.caption: A dimly lit hotel hallway with a beige carpet, framed pictures on the walls, and a lamp mounted on the wall.

An interior hallway of a hotel, likely the londres hotel in san sebastian, gipuzkoa, spain. the hallway is well-lit, with a patterned carpet and a beige wall. a man is standing in the hallway, facing a window, and appears to be interacting with the window, possibly adjusting the blinds or curtains. there are framed pictures on the wall, and a green exit sign is visible above the door. the overall ambiance suggests a modern and comfortable hotel environment.
a large swimming pool inside of a hotel
